about.label: ABOUT
about.title: About ISHIGAKI NIGHT
about.subtitle: A media platform bringing Ishigaki's nightlife to the world
about.section1Body: ISHIGAKI NIGHT is a web media platform covering bars, izakayas, live houses, and clubs on Ishigaki Island — in Japanese, English, Chinese, and Korean. We make sure tourists never have to wonder where to go tonight.
about.section2Body: ISHIGAKI NIGHT partners with 'Ishigaki Yabanashi,' a free paper distributed across the island. QR codes in the free paper link directly to our website, combining print and digital to guide visitors through Ishigaki's nights.
about.section3Body: We offer various plans including spot listings, banner ads, and coupon features on ISHIGAKI NIGHT. If you'd like to promote your venue, please get in touch.
